creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hej, 
please give us instructions which do not appear to be a waste of characters. 
Also there's nothing we can check if we do not have at least a backtrace. 
Instructions on how to get one can be found in the developer handbook. 
Please don't hesitate to send us anything useful for checking your issue. 
Thank you very much.
